query:
CREATE TABLE `characterAvatars` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`characterId` int NOT NULL,
	`avatarUrl` text NOT NULL,
	`avatarKey` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`generationPrompt` text,
	`generationTime` int,
	`isDefault` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `characterAvatars_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `f2fVerificationLogs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`verificationId` int,
	`action` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`details` text,
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `f2fVerificationLogs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `f2fVerifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`verificationStatus` enum('pending','verified','rejected','expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`facePhotoUrl` text,
	`facePhotoKey` varchar(255),
	`livenessCheckUrl` text,
	`livenessCheckKey` varchar(255),
	`livenessScore` decimal(5,2),
	`fraudScore` decimal(5,2),
	`verificationAttempts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`lastAttemptAt` timestamp,
	`verifiedAt` timestamp,
	`expiresAt` timestamp,
	`verificationNotes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `f2fVerifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `characterAvatars` ADD CONSTRAINT `characterAvatars_characterId_characters_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`characterId`) REFERENCES `characters`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `f2fVerificationLogs` ADD CONSTRAINT `f2fVerificationLogs_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `f2fVerificationLogs` ADD CONSTRAINT `f2fVerificationLogs_verificationId_f2fVerifications_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`verificationId`) REFERENCES `f2fVerifications`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `f2fVerifications` ADD CONSTRAINT `f2fVerifications_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE cascade ON UPDATE no action;
